case_title: ZWE HTET OO VS. LELAND TATUM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF JORGE L. TORREZ AND DEFENDANT RUBEN MELLADO. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
